description_long: This is a modern smartwatch with a rectangular touchscreen display, featuring a grid of colorful app icons on its face. The watch case is metallic with rounded edges, and a prominent crown button is visible on the right side. The strap is made of flexible material, likely silicone or rubber, with a matte finish and multiple adjustment holes for sizing. The underside of the watch has four circular sensors, likely for heart rate or biometric monitoring. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for everyday urban wear. The color palette is primarily gray and black, with the display providing a burst of color.
description: A sleek, rectangular smartwatch with a colorful touchscreen display, metallic case, and a matte silicone strap.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the colorful app grid on the display, metallic case, and the strap's texture.
description_view_1: Front-right view highlighting the crown button and the smooth transition between the case and strap.
description_view_2: Rear-left view displaying the four circular sensors on the back and the strap's adjustment holes.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the back sensors and the curvature of the strap.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is a full-color digital touchscreen displaying a grid of circular app icons, with no traditional markers, numerals, or subdials. The style is modern and functional, with a minimalist bezel and no decorative elements.
attribute_strap_type: Flexible silicone strap with a matte finish and multiple adjustment holes, integrated seamlessly with the watch case.
attribute_watch_face_display: Digital display with a grid of colorful app icons, no analog hands or numerals, and touch interaction capability.
